name: Carrot-Spice Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the appropriate temperature for baking bread.
2. In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, dry milk, salt, and allspice.
3. Add the butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
4. Grate 1/4 cup of carrots (approximately 1 oz) into the mixture.
5. Stir in 1 tablespoon of honey and 3/4 cup of water.
6. Dissolve the yeast in a separate small amount of warm water or place it directly into the yeast holder on your bread maker.
7. Pour all the liquid ingredients into the bread pan, ensuring not to add any liquids that are already incorporated with the dry ingredients.
8. Close the lid and start the baking process according to your bread maker's instructions.
